artPrompt: A commanding portrait of an aged goblin boss in a velvet-collared coat seated in a high-backed chair, a small flowering sprig tucked in his lapel, one clawed hand resting on a cane while lesser goblins lean in deferentially from the shadows. A single amber lamp gilds his weathered, watchful face, cigar smoke drifting upward. Mono-black noir of ink shadow and smoky brown, dynastic criminal gravity, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: The Goblin Godfather
text:
Other Goblins you control get +1/+1.
When The Goblin Godfather enters the battlefield, for each opponent, that player gives you a snack, a Treasure, or a card (their choice) and you create a Favor token. He's family. Everyone is, now, whether they like it or not.
{B}{B}, Sacrifice three Favors: Search your library for a Goblin card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. He always knows a guy. The guy always knows another guy.
flavorText: Gnasher runs the town hall. The Godfather runs Gnasher. Family is family.
